personality_one_liner: A spartan, high-contrast, rugged command center for outdoor tracking, optimized for high visibility under bright sun and glove-friendly operation.

spacing.rule: Generous hit targets for gloved fingers. Min tap area 64x64pt.

dont's: No glass on this app - spartan high-contrast aesthetics.
Never blur - use solid backgrounds to guarantee visibility under bright sunlight.

haptics.NO_TOLERANCE: always have switcher in settings or profile page
haptics.wiring: Haptic calls live inside these components (Button primary, TabBar item, switch) they fire automatically on use. Provide a global triggerHaptic util that checks a setting.

screens.name: Начало (Home)
screens.purpose: Command center for the trip - live GPS map, quick marker dropping, and global Start/Stop route tracking.

states.empty: No active route, map centered on user GPS.
states.error: GPS signal lost or map tiles missing - clear error banner over map.

screens.name: Архив (Archive)
screens.purpose: Chronological history of past trips with basic stats.

states.loading: List skeleton with trip card outlines.
states.empty: Empty state illustration of a map/compass + 'Няма записани маршрути'.
states.error: Failed to load past trips, retry button.

instructions_to_main_agent: Design is spartan, outdoor-focused. No glassmorphism. Solid high-contrast colors.
App defaults to Dark Theme. Ensure the status bar is light content.

Screen 1 Layout: Upper 50-60% is `react-native-maps` View showing OpenStreetMap. Lower section is a grid of 5 marker buttons (Car/Boat, Fish, Mushroom, Hazard, Water). Bottom most is a giant START/STOP toggle CTA.
Marker buttons must be large (min 64dp height) for glove-friendly use. Icons at 28-32px.
Color map for markers: car/boat (markerCar), fish (markerFish), mushroom (markerMushroom), hazard (markerHazard), water (markerWater).
Start button is solid `success` green. Stop button is solid `error` red.
Do NOT use gradients or subtle blurs. The priority is maximum readability in direct sunlight.
Haptics must be aggressive for drops (marker dropped -> heavy impact) to give physical feedback out on terrain.
Ensure `react-native-maps` is integrated using OSM provider or at least standard map tiles with high contrast.
